name: Vita: Rift of a Nation
short_description: A Story-Rich Turn-Based RPG. Follow Naysa-Dae, an Earth Vita, as she discovers what freedom truly is, fights to keep it, and liberates the nation of Opolo. Be the rift that the world of Atria will never forget.
detailed_description:
The Story

Return to Atria: Where Freedom Sparks Revolution in Vita: Rift of a Nation

The shackles of slavery have been shattered, but after tasting freedom, Naysa-Dae realizes the fight is far from over. Follow the gripping tale of Naysa-Dae, an Earth Vita as she travels across the nation of Opolo. A land inspired by Ancient American civilizations. Team up with a battle-hardened veteran, an outlander and a mute slave girl, as they fight for the hearts and souls of Opolo

Witness the tremors of rebellion that will shake the very foundation of a nation. In the second part of the Vita series, that expands the world of Atria. bringing the series to it's first elemental focused story.

Will you break your chains and be the Rift that Atria will never forget?

Features

Naysa-Dae's journey evolves from personal liberation to a fight for the soul of Opolo. Witness the transformation of a slave woman into a fierce leader, wielding the power of the Earth Vitas in this fast paced, story rich classic RPG.

  • Master the dynamic Dule Resource Turn-Based Battle System (DRTBS).

  • Immersive hand craft maps, battle fields and art.

  • Engage in a boss rush mode that will take you through every fight in the game (Introduced in update 2.0)

  • Go beyond the journey with Side Stories. A glimpse into the lives of Opolo (Introduced in update 3.0)

  • Enjoy somber world music and heart-pounding battle themes

  • Team up with a battle-hardened veteran, an outlander, and a fellow slave with their own backstories, hopes, and dreams for the nation of Opolo.

  • Learn why slavery took over the land, and who's truly behind it.

Be the rift that Atria will never forget.

Why Play Vita: Rift of a Nation?

An RPG with a Soul: We don’t just build games; we build worlds. Vita: Rift of a Nation is a labor of love, crafted by hand to bring back the feeling of the classic adventures we grew up with. Where the story matters as the mirror is turned on human history and cultures

  • A World That Breathes: Opolo isn't just a map; it’s a culture inspired by the majesty of ancient civilizations, filled with people who have lives, secrets, and a reason to fight.

  • A Fighter's Heart: Combat isn't just about mashing buttons. It’s about mastering the elements and finding the perfect synergy, managing resources and timing just when to strike.

  • Your Time Matters: The Vita series is designed to be short form RPGs. We don't always have 6 or 7 hours to sit and play a game in today's world. The Vita stories get to the point, So you can enjoy a great story, and then go about your life. 

  • A work of Passion: The Vita series is created by a Solo Developer. This series was never about creating a one off game, but building an entire world, with culture, personality and crafted with love for the art of video games.
